objective: Execute the full-data Solution C baseline on remote A40 hardware to verify operational viability and capture a reproducible metric record.

commands.train: ssh -p 22141 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@194.68.245.210 'cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && ln -sf official_coursework/trial_data/ED_trial.csv test.csv && source .venv/bin/activate && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_001 && jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute solution_c_baseline_development.ipynb --output executed_solution_c_baseline.ipynb --output-dir experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_001 --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=0 2>&1 | tee experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_001/stdout.log'

notes: Remote A40 run completed end-to-end and produced checkpoints plus an executed notebook, but eval_loss became NaN and dev precision/recall/F1 collapsed to 0.0. This confirms the infrastructure path works while the current Solution C training configuration is degenerate on real hardware.
